info.title: Timer-NX
info.author: SudoTronics
info.description: A countdown timer for Nintendo Switch
info.details: A countdown timer for your Nintendo Switch. Set custom durations, with the ability to pause and resume and get notified when time's up with both haptic feedback and audio alerts.

changelog:
v2.0
What's been added :

- Now using @Borialis: https://github.com/xfangfang/borealis for the UI.
- Added the ability to save timers.

Initial release
